user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface websites in ChatGPT search results
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing in ChatGPT's search features

user_agents.name: OAI-AdsBot
user_agents.purpose: Validate safety of web pages submitted as ads on ChatGPT
user_agents.scope: Only visits pages submitted as ads; not used for training generative AI models

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for generative AI foundation models
user_agents.scope: Crawl content used in training generative AI foundation models

user_agents.name: ChatGPT-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered fetches for live responses and GPT Actions
user_agents.scope: User-initiated actions in ChatGPT and Custom GPTs; not automatic web crawl

user_agents.name: Claude-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered fetch for live responses in Claude conversations
user_agents.scope: Fetches content linked in user messages for processing in Claude
user_agents.opt_out: Can be configured via Claude extension permissions or browser settings

user_agents.name: ClaudeBot
user_agents.purpose: Training and model improvement data collection
user_agents.scope: General web crawling for training datasets
user_agents.opt_out: Respects robots.txt Disallow rules and User-Agent blocking

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: Build Google Search indexes and other product-specific crawls
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Google Search, Discover, Images, Video, News

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Crawl images for Google Images and search features
user_agents.scope: Image-specific crawl for Google Images, Discover, Video, and Search features

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Crawl videos for video-related search features
user_agents.scope: Video-specific crawl for video-related Google Search features

user_agents.name: Googlebot-News
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content for Google News product
user_agents.scope: News-specific crawl using various Googlebot user agent strings

user_agents.name: Storebot-Google
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content for Google Shopping surfaces
user_agents.scope: Shopping-specific crawl for Shopping tab and Google Shopping

user_agents.name: Google-InspectionTool
user_agents.purpose: Testing and inspection for Search Console tools
user_agents.scope: Test-specific crawl for Rich Result Test and URL inspection tools

user_agents.name: GoogleOther
user_agents.purpose: Generic crawler for various internal research and development crawls
user_agents.scope: General purpose crawl for public content, no specific product impact

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Image
user_agents.purpose: Generic image crawler for internal research and development
user_agents.scope: Image-specific crawl optimized for public image URLs

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Video
user_agents.purpose: Generic video crawler for internal research and development
user_agents.scope: Video-specific crawl optimized for public video URLs

user_agents.name: Google-CloudVertexBot
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content for building Vertex AI Agents
user_agents.scope: Crawls requested by site owners for Vertex AI Agents

user_agents.name: Google-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for Gemini models and grounding purposes
user_agents.scope: Uses existing Google user agent strings; robots.txt token for control. For Gemini Apps and Vertex AI API training and grounding.

user_agents.name: PerplexityBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface and link websites in search results on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing; not used for AI foundation model training
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow PerplexityBot in robots.txt file or block published IP ranges

user_agents.name: Perplexity-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered web page fetches for answering user questions
user_agents.scope: User-requested fetches to provide accurate answers; generally ignores robots.txt rules
user_agents.opt_out: Control via Perplexity-User IP address whitelist/blocklist; user-agent blocking may be used

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Powers search technology in Spotlight, Siri, Safari, and generative AI training
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for indexing and rendering webpages across Apple ecosystem
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow Applebot-Extended in robots.txt to opt-out of generative AI training; disallow Applebot for search indexing

user_agents.name: Applebot-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Determines usage of crawled data for training Apple foundation models and generative AI
user_agents.scope: Does not crawl webpages; applies to data already crawled by Applebot
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Applebot-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt to opt-out of AI model training

user_agents.name: iTMS
user_agents.purpose: Crawls URLs associated with registered content on Apple Podcasts
user_agents.scope: Podcast-specific crawling; does not follow robots.txt as not a general search crawler

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAgent
user_agents.purpose: Training foundation AI models or improving products by indexing content directly
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI model training and product improvement

user_agents.name: Bingbot
user_agents.purpose: Search indexing and ranking for Bing search engine
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Bing search results

user_agents.name: Bingbot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Image indexing for Bing image search results
user_agents.scope: Crawls images across the web for Bing Images

user_agents.name: Bingbot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Video indexing for Bing video search results
user_agents.scope: Crawls video content for Bing video search

user_agents.name: Bingbot-News
user_agents.purpose: News content indexing for Bing News results
user_agents.scope: Crawls news articles for Bing News

user_agents.name: BingPreview
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered preview fetching for Bing search results
user_agents.scope: Fetches content when user hovers or clicks on search results

user_agents.name: AdIdxBot
user_agents.purpose: Web content crawling for advertising and search purposes
user_agents.scope: General web crawl supporting Bing ad indexing

user_agents.name: BingCopilot
user_agents.purpose: Content retrieval for Copilot AI assistant responses
user_agents.scope: Fetches web content to generate grounded AI responses

user_agents.name: Amazonbot
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling and indexing for Amazon services

user_agents.name: CCBot
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl archive
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for archival and indexing purposes
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt Disallow rules are honored by CCBot crawler
